title: Habranthus longifolius
taxonomy: Habranthus longifolius is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This family includes various other flowering plants, commonly known as amaryllis or lily. Habranthus longifolius is native to South America, specifically in the temperate regions of Argentina, Uruguay, and southern Brazil. Its classification also includes the genus Habranthus, which is part of the tribe Hippeastreae.
